appSubtitle: Set up a local AI assistant on this computer.
ollamaStopped: Ollama is installed but not running
setupIntroBody: MiVA uses Ollama to download and run lightweight AI models locally. Install Ollama first, then choose a model.
modelsBody: Phase 1 only allows small models that are practical for local testing.
chatBody: After a model is installed, send a message to confirm local inference works.
defaultStorage: Phase 1 uses Ollama's default model storage path.
